title: Vanilla with Benefits
body:
Love the core Minecraft gameplay but wish it ran smoother and had a few extra conveniences? **Vanilla with Benefits** is designed exactly for that! This modpack focuses on heavily optimizing the game for **maximum performance** while adding carefully selected **utility and quality-of-life features** to enhance your vanilla experience without changing the fundamental feel of Minecraft.

It's the perfect pack for players who want the base game, just *better*.

### Core Benefits:

**🚀 Blazing Fast Performance & Optimization:**
Experience significantly smoother gameplay, higher FPS, and reduced stuttering. This pack includes industry-standard optimization mods:
* `Sodium`, `Lithium`, `Krypton`: The trifecta for rendering, server-side, and networking improvements.
* `Immediately Fast`, `Entity Culling`, `More Culling`, `Model Gap Fix`: Further boosts performance by optimizing various game aspects and reducing unnecessary rendering.
* `Debugify`: Fixes numerous vanilla bugs for a more stable experience.

**✨ Enhanced Visuals & Immersion:**
Enjoy subtle but impactful visual upgrades that maintain the vanilla aesthetic:
* `Iris Shaders`: The gateway to stunning shader packs (shaders not included by default).
* `Distant Horizons`: Experience breathtakingly long render distances, seeing your world like never before.
* `LambDynamicLights`: Held light sources and burning entities actually illuminate the world around them.
* `BetterGrassify`, `Cubes Without Borders`, `Simple Fog Control`, `Raised`: Small tweaks that improve visual cohesion and atmosphere.
* `Sound Physics Remastered`: Adds realistic sound reverberation and attenuation.

**🛠️ Quality of Life & Utility:**
Streamline your gameplay with helpful tools and information:
* `JourneyMap`: A comprehensive mini-map and full-screen map to navigate your world.
* `AppleSkin`: Clearly shows saturation and hunger restored by food items.
* `ItemSwapper`, `Shulker Box Tooltip`: Makes inventory management easier and more informative.
* `Simple Voice Chat`: Adds proximity-based voice communication (requires server support).
* `Accurate Block Placement Reborn`: Provides more predictable block placement.
* `More Chat History`, `Text Formatting Everywhere`: Enhances the chat interface.
* `Better Mount HUD`: Improved interface when riding mounts.

**🔧 Customization & Control:**
Tailor the game to your preferences:
* `Mod Menu`: Easily view and configure installed mods.
* `Reese's Sodium Options`, `Sodium Extra`, `OptiGUI`: More granular control over performance and visual settings, plus support for OptiFine resource pack GUI features.
* `Gamma Utils`: Easily adjust brightness.
* `Language Reload`: Reload languages without the Resource Packs reloading.
* `Skin Shuffle`: Cycle through different skins.
* `Variants-CIT`: Enables OptiFine Custom Item Texture features for resource packs.

**💡 Extra Tools:**
* `Freecam`: A spectator-like camera mode for exploration or screenshots (use responsibly!).
* `Zoomify`: Adds a configurable zoom key.
* `Server Resourcepack Checker`: Helps manage server resource packs.

---

### Who is this pack for?

* Players who want the vanilla Minecraft experience, but **faster** and **smoother**.
* Anyone looking for **performance improvements**, especially on lower-end hardware.
* Players who enjoy **subtle visual enhancements** and **useful utilities** without adding new blocks, items, or dimensions.
* Those who want **shader support** without sacrificing performance.

Give **Vanilla with Benefits** a try and enjoy a significantly improved, yet comfortingly familiar, Minecraft adventure!
